helpful: The Google search tool was essential in discovering the recent CVSG, which dramatically shifted the base rate.
gaps: Would be helpful to have a direct tool to check the SCOTUS docket for CVSG and relist information without relying on generalized web search or CourtListener delays.
notes: The Supreme Court docket-entries endpoint in CourtListener did not return results for this case, so I had to rely on a Google web search.
